name: allure-deployer-action
description: Host Allure test reports on the web with history, retries, and Slack integration—no server required

scripts.build: rm -rf ./dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && ncc build dist/index.js -o dist/main -e allure-commandline && ncc build dist/utilities/cleanup.js -o dist/cleanup && cd dist/main && npm install allure-commandline@^2.38.1 --omit=dev --silent
